case_title: JAVIER GONZALEZ VS. SARAH HUI LI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT LI, SARAH HUI WEN DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-03-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-02-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-10-2014
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-03-2014 CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-24-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-14-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF GUNTER MIHAESCU IN SUPPORT OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND WHY THE CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED (TRANSACTION ID # 56715727) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JAVIER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-24-2015 CONTINUED TO JUN-09-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-24-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 56887497) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JAVIER
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 15091006)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-09-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
